channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Farrer by-election sees independent and One Nation candidates leading
item.description: With just three days to go until the Farrer by-election, voters in the former seat of Sussan Ley are witnessing an unprecedented political contest. Traditional parties like the Nationals and Liberals ...

item.title: Texas Jury Sentences Tanner Horner to Death for the 2022 Kidnapping and Murder of 7-Year-Old Athena Strand
item.description: A Texas jury don finish their work sharp-sharp and sentence Tanner Horner to death after just two and half hours of deliberation for the wicked kidnapping and murder of 7-year-old Athena Strand wey ha...

item.title: INEC to Resume Final Nationwide Voter Registration from May 11 Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: INEC don announce say the final phase of Continuous Voter Registration (CVR) go start nationwide from May 11, 2026, as part of preparation for the 2027 general elections. The exercise go run till July...

item.title: Oak Bay police investigate repeated harassment of women-run businesses
item.description: Several women-owned businesses in Oak Bay, British Columbia, have been experiencing repeated harassment from an anonymous caller. The incidents began on March 27, when Jennifer Brewerton, owner of Laz...

item.title: Finance Minister Oyedele Reaffirms Nigeria’s Commitment to Market Reforms Without Fuel Subsidy or Price Controls
item.description: The new Minister of Finance and Coordinating Minister of the Economy, Taiwo Oyedele, don talk am clear say Nigeria no go go back to the old days of fuel subsidy and price controls. Him talk this one a...

item.title: Green Party leader Zack Polanski admits misrepresenting Red Cross role and addresses party controversies
item.description: Zack Polanski, leader of the Green Party of England and Wales, has admitted he was wrong to describe himself as a spokesman for the British Red Cross. Polanski clarified that while he has hosted fundr...

item.title: Analysis of Trump's Recent Actions in the Middle East
item.description: The article titled 'Has Trump just made another mess in the Middle East?' appears to discuss recent political developments involving former U.S. President Donald Trump and his impact on the Middle Eas...

item.title: Mombasa Police Arrest One Suspect and Recover Panga After Foiling Armed Robbery in Mwembe Tayari
item.description: In the early hours of Wednesday, May 6, police officers in Mombasa Central Sub-County swiftly responded to a distress call and foiled an attempted armed robbery at an establishment in Mwembe Tayari. T...

item.title: Medical evacuation of three passengers from MV Hondius after hantavirus outbreak
item.description: An emergency medical operation is ongoing off the coast of West Africa, where three passengers are set to be evacuated from the Dutch-flagged expedition vessel, MV Hondius, following a hantavirus outb...

item.title: Delhi High Court grants extension to Centre on Ashok Swain's plea challenging blacklisting
item.description: The Delhi High Court on Wednesday extended by two weeks the time for the central government to respond to a petition filed by Professor Ashok Swain, head of the Department of Peace and Conflict Resear...

item.title: Linda Perry to receive special international award at 2026 Ivor Novello Awards
item.description: US musician and songwriter Linda Perry, best known as the frontwoman of 4 Non Blondes and for composing major hits for numerous artists, is set to be honoured with a special international award at the...

item.title: Prince Archie Marks Seventh Birthday in California Away from the Royal Family
item.description: Prince Archie is celebrating his seventh birthday in Montecito, California, far from the Royal Family in the United Kingdom. The Duke and Duchess of Sussex, Prince Harry and Meghan Markle, have limite...

item.title: Analysis shows SIR voter deletions exceeded BJP victory margins in 105 Bengal seats
item.description: According to a data analysis by Scroll.in, in 105 assembly seats won by the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) in the West Bengal elections 2026, the total number of voters deleted during the Special Intens...

item.title: AfroExchange and Johnnie Walker collaborate to expand Tanzanian music beyond borders
item.description: Dar es Salaam was buzzing as AfroExchange, in partnership with Johnnie Walker, gathered DJs and music creatives to discuss how Tanzanian music can reach international audiences. The dialogue highlight...

item.title: Experts and ministers discuss challenges and solutions for Indus Basin at Breathe Pakistan Conference
item.description: At the second edition of the Breathe Pakistan International Climate Change Conference in Islamabad, Water Resources Minister Mian Muhammad Mueen Wattoo and other experts highlighted serious concerns a...

item.title: Monti International hosts high-level swimming camp with Tanzanian and Kenyan athletes
item.description: Dar es Salaam hosted a 10-day high-performance swimming camp at Monti International School, bringing together more than 100 swimmers and 20 local and regional coaches from Tanzania and Kenya. Led by r...

item.title: Energy CS Opiyo Wandayi Explains Fuel Shortage as Technical Issue and Confirms Restoration
item.description: Energy Cabinet Secretary Opiyo Wandayi has come out to explain the fuel shortages that hit some parts of Kenya recently. He said the problem was caused by a technical and administrative hitch that aff...

item.title: Cruise Ship with Hantavirus Cases Allowed to Dock in Canary Islands
item.description: A luxury cruise ship that has experienced an outbreak of hantavirus is set to dock in the Canary Islands after receiving permission from the Spanish government. The vessel was travelling from Cape Ver...

item.title: Supreme Court and Federal Constitutional Court to operate independently under 27th Amendment
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Chief Justice of Pakistan, Yahya Afridi, clarified that following the 27th Amendment, the Supreme Court (SC) and the Federal Constitutional Court (FCC) are coordinate courts, each having di...

item.title: CUET UG 2026 Exam: Tips to Improve Performance and Avoid Common Mistakes
item.description: The article aimed to provide detailed guidance for students appearing for the CUET UG 2026 exam. It focused on section-wise strategies to help aspirants maximise their marks and highlighted common mis...
